rationale: All three lenses ran against a 163-line diff (3 files). No critical or major blocking findings. Five items deferred: (1) button positioning follows the exact MermaidDiagram.tsx precedent explicitly specified in the spec and approved by the user; (2) Parser.parse+DOMPurify.sanitize call pattern pre-exists for all other blockTokens via getBlockProps — not a regression; (3) copyToClipboard silent-fail on unavailable clipboard is a pre-existing utility issue, out of scope; (4) clipboard format (raw markdown) was an explicit design decision confirmed with the user; (5) focus-visible styling relies on Button component's native browser defaults, consistent with all other Button usages in the codebase. Commit format passes project regex. TypeScript clean. Two deferred items (EC-001 scroll overlap, EC-005 memoization) are worth a follow-up ticket but do not block this PR. 1 dismissed finding (empty-input test) out of spec scope.

business_review.criterion: A visible copy button is available for generated table outputs.
business_review.notes: TableBlock renders a Button with CopySvg icon at absolute top-0 right-0 z-10 over every table output.

business_review.criterion: Clicking copies the full table content, not only the visible portion.
business_review.notes: onClick calls copyToClipboard(raw) where raw is token.raw — the complete markdown source of the table.

business_review.criterion: Copied content preserves markdown pipe-table structure.
business_review.notes: token.raw from the marked lexer is the original pipe-table string.

business_review.criterion: Works for wide and long tables.
business_review.notes: Copy action copies token.raw regardless of visible area. No truncation.

business_review.criterion: User receives clear feedback after copying.
business_review.notes: copyToClipboard called with 'Table copied to clipboard' notification string.

business_review.criterion: Copy button follows existing CodeMie UI style.
business_review.notes: ButtonType.TERTIARY, ButtonSize.MEDIUM, bg-surface-base-primary and hover:bg-surface-specific-dropdown-hover — consistent with MermaidDiagram and CodeBlock patterns.

Button is a native <button> element — natively keyboard-focusable. No explicit focus-visible ring added in TableBlock; relies on Button component browser defaults. Deferred: consistent with all other Button usages in the codebase.
aria-label="Copy table" present; asserted by unit test getByRole('button', { name: 'Copy table' }).

business_review.criterion: Existing message-level copy functionality is not broken.
business_review.notes: ChatAiMessageActions untouched. All other MarkdownTokens branches intact.

business_review.criterion: 'table' removed from blockTokens array in MarkdownTokens.tsx.
Three unit tests: renders HTML, renders button with aria-label, calls copyToClipboard on click.
business_review.notes: All three tests present and passing (3/3 green).

standards_review.notes: Both commits match EPMCDME-XXXX: Capital sentence pattern. 'EPMCDME-13243: Add TableBlock component with copy button' and 'EPMCDME-13243: Wire TableBlock into MarkdownTokens' both valid.
tsc --noEmit passed with no errors (confirmed by pre-commit hook output).
eslint --fix ran cleanly during pre-commit hooks for both commits.
License headers checked by pre-commit hook — 0 missing.
html prop is DOMPurify-sanitized by caller before passing to TableBlock. Same contract as all other dangerouslySetInnerHTML usages in the markdown pipeline.
